nodes.name: KalkMate3.png
nodes.summary: Product marketing image showing two Esperanza-branded desktop calculators on a dark glossy surface. The foreground calculator (silver bezel, black keys) displays 'KalkMate' as dot-matrix text on its segmented LCD. The background calculator (darker grey) displays '= 42' on its LCD. Both units show standard 12-digit calculator layouts with MC/MR/M-/M+/MU memory keys, C/CE, +/- sign toggle, digits 0-9, decimal point, basic arithmetic operators, and a percent key. Cinematic studio lighting with reflections on the desk surface. Used as a hero/promotional render for the KalkMate product website, illustrating the form-factor concept: a familiar pocket calculator reimagined as an AI-assisted matura-exam solver.
